user.title: Configure Hisense VIDAA TV
user.description: Enter the IP address and optionally MAC address of your Hisense TV.

auth.title: Enter TV PIN Code
auth.description: A 4-digit PIN code should now be displayed on your TV screen. Please enter it below.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the TV.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid PIN code. Please try again.
